goal_instruction: You are on the Rivermark City Services portal. Reach the After-Hours Utility Shutoff Reversal Form page.

city_home.title: Rivermark City Services
city_home.text: Rivermark City Services helps residents manage utilities, permits, emergency requests, and account support.

links.label: Utilities
links.preview_text: Billing, service interruptions, meter issues, and utility forms.

links.label: Resident Help Center
links.preview_text: General city help, service requests, and account support.

links.label: Emergency Updates
links.preview_text: Outages, storm updates, and emergency service notices.

utilities.title: Utilities
utilities.text: Utilities supports billing, shutoff prevention, restoration requests, outage status, and utility account forms.

links.label: Service Interruptions
links.preview_text: Shutoffs, restorations, and interruption policies.

links.label: Billing and Payments
links.preview_text: Bills, payment plans, and due date questions.

links.label: Utility Forms Library
links.preview_text: Applications, requests, and utility-related forms.

service_interruptions.title: Service Interruptions
service_interruptions.text: Service Interruption resources cover planned shutoffs, emergency restorations, payment-related disconnections, and after-hours access help.

links.label: Restoration and Reconnection
links.preview_text: Reconnect service after disconnection or repair.

links.label: Outage Map
links.preview_text: View current outage areas and utility crews.

links.label: Utility Forms Library
links.preview_text: Browse all utility service forms.

restoration_reconnection.title: Restoration and Reconnection
restoration_reconnection.text: Use Restoration and Reconnection for scheduled reconnects, emergency restoration, after-hours shutoff reversals, and service reactivation requests.

links.label: Emergency Restoration
links.preview_text: Critical restoration workflows for urgent cases and after-hours shutoffs.

links.label: Standard Reconnection Request
links.preview_text: Routine business-hours reconnection workflow.

links.label: Billing and Payments
links.preview_text: Resolve payment holds before requesting restoration.

emergency_restoration.title: Emergency Restoration
emergency_restoration.text: Emergency Restoration includes outage restoration procedures, life-safety restoration requests, and after-hours shutoff reversal intake.

links.label: After-Hours Reversal Requests
links.preview_text: After-hours shutoff reversal requests and supporting forms.

links.label: Life-Safety Restoration
links.preview_text: Critical restoration requests for medical or safety need.

links.label: Storm and Outage Recovery
links.preview_text: Large-scale outage restoration updates.

after_hours_reversal_requests.title: After-Hours Reversal Requests
after_hours_reversal_requests.text: After-hours reversal requests include after-hours utility shutoff reversal forms, supervisor contact rules, and urgent reconnect guidance.

links.label: After-Hours Utility Shutoff Reversal Form

links.preview_text: Form for urgent after-hours shutoff reversal requests.

resident_help_center.title: Resident Help Center
resident_help_center.text: The Resident Help Center covers general city support, case intake, service request routing, and account contact updates.
